Hub Home > customer-service > Loyalty Program Design & Comms Builder

Loyalty Program Design & Comms Builder

Design a complete customer loyalty program including tier structure, point mechanics, reward catalog, and a full communication sequence (launch email, milestone triggers, win-back flows) tailored to your average order value and customer lifecycle.

Expert MULTI-STEP WORKFLOW Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Provide your AOV, purchase frequency, customer lifetime value, and churn rate. The agentic approach lets the AI iterate on the tier economics until the unit economics are positive.

loyalty retention rewards email sequence customer lifecycle churn

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a customer retention strategist. Design a complete loyalty program for my [INDUSTRY] business.

<business_metrics>
Average order value (AOV): $[AMOUNT]
Average purchase frequency: [X] times...
You are a customer retention strategist. Design a complete loyalty program for my [INDUSTRY] business.

<business_metrics>
Average order value (AOV): $[AMOUNT]
Average purchase frequency: [X] times...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a customer retention strategist. Design a complete loyalty program for my [INDUSTRY] business.

<business_metrics>
Average order value (AOV): $[AMOUNT]
Average purchase frequency: [X] times per [PERIOD]
Customer lifetime value (CLV): $[AMOUNT]
Current churn rate: [X]%
Total active customers: [NUMBER]
Current retention tactics: [DESCRIBE ANY EXISTING PROGRAMS]
</business_metrics>

Design the following:

**Part 1 — Program Structure:**
- Program name (3 options, on-brand)
- Tier structure (3 tiers with clear earning thresholds)
- Point mechanics (earn rate, redemption rate, expiration policy)
- Reward catalog (at least 5 rewards per tier, mix of discounts, exclusives, and experiences)
- Unit economics validation: show that the program is margin-positive at each tier

**Part 2 — Communication Sequence:**
- Launch announcement email
- Welcome email (when customer enrolls)
- First milestone celebration (e.g., 100 points earned)
- Tier upgrade notification
- Points expiration reminder (30 days out)
- Win-back email (for lapsed members, 60+ days inactive)
- Monthly statement email

**Part 3 — Success Metrics:**
- KPIs to track (with target benchmarks)
- A/B test recommendations for the first 90 days

For each email, provide full copy with subject line, preview text, body, and CTA.
Notes: Ideal for Claude Projects — store business metrics persistently and iterate across sessions.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a customer retention and loyalty program strategist. Design a full loyalty program for my [INDUSTRY] business.

**My Numbers:**
- AOV: $[AMOUNT]
- Purchase frequency: [X] per...
Act as a customer retention and loyalty program strategist. Design a full loyalty program for my [INDUSTRY] business.

**My Numbers:**
- AOV: $[AMOUNT]
- Purchase frequency: [X] per...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a customer retention and loyalty program strategist. Design a full loyalty program for my [INDUSTRY] business.

**My Numbers:**
- AOV: $[AMOUNT]
- Purchase frequency: [X] per [PERIOD]
- CLV: $[AMOUNT]
- Churn rate: [X]%
- Active customers: [NUMBER]
- Current retention efforts: [DESCRIBE]

**Deliverable 1 — Program Design:**
- 3 name options
- 3-tier structure with earning thresholds
- Point earn/redeem rates and expiration rules
- 5+ rewards per tier (discounts, exclusives, experiences)
- Prove each tier is margin-positive

**Deliverable 2 — Full Email Sequence:**
Write complete emails (subject line, preview text, body, CTA) for:
1. Launch announcement
2. Welcome/enrollment
3. First milestone (e.g., 100 points)
4. Tier upgrade
5. Points expiration warning (30 days)
6. Win-back (60+ days inactive)
7. Monthly points statement

**Deliverable 3 — Measurement:**
- KPIs with benchmarks
- 3 A/B test ideas for the first 90 days
Notes: Long output — may need "continue generating." Code Interpreter can model the unit economics.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

I want to build a customer loyalty program for my [INDUSTRY] business. Help me design the complete program and all launch communications.

**My business data:**
- Average order value: $[AMOUNT]
- How often customers buy: [X] times per [PERIOD]
- Customer lifetime value: $[AMOUNT]
- Churn rate: [X]%
- Active customers: [NUMBER]
- What I currently do for retention: [DESCRIBE]

**Please create:**

1. **Program structure:** 3 name options, 3-tier system, point earn/redeem mechanics, 5+ rewards per tier, and proof that the math works (margin-positive at each tier)

2. **Email sequence:** Full copy (subject, preview text, body, CTA) for: launch announcement, welcome email, first milestone, tier upgrade, points expiration reminder, win-back email, monthly statement

3. **How to measure success:** Key metrics with benchmarks, and 3 A/B tests to run in the first 90 days
Notes: Gemini can research competitor loyalty programs in real-time to benchmark your tier structure.

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

I want to create a rewards program for my [INDUSTRY] business to keep customers coming back. Help me design the whole thing and write the emails.

**My business info:**
- Average order: $[AMOUNT]
- How often customers buy: [X] times per [PERIOD]
- Customer lifetime value: $[AMOUNT]
- How many customers leave: [X]%
- Active customers: [NUMBER]
- What I do now to keep customers: [DESCRIBE]

**I need:**

1. **The program:** A name (give me 3 options), 3 reward levels, how customers earn and spend points, what rewards they can get (at least 5 per level), and show me the program won't lose money.

2. **The emails:** Write complete emails for: program launch, welcome, first reward milestone, level-up notification, points about to expire, come-back email for inactive customers, and a monthly summary.

3. **How to track if it is working:** What numbers to watch, what targets to aim for, and 3 things to A/B test in the first 90 days.

Make the emails sound friendly and on-brand for a small business.
Notes: Copilot in Outlook can turn the email drafts into ready-to-send campaigns.

Built by AlignAI — They rank who pays. We score what works.
